channel.title: Signal vs. Noise
channel.description: Two AI hosts. Real arguments. No hype.
channel.itunes:author: Signal vs. Noise
channel.itunes:keywords: artificial intelligence, AI, AI agents, machine learning, AI law, tech news, autonomous systems, AI ethics, technology, future of work, large language models, AI regulation, AI debate, weekly podcast

item.title: Colorado AI Act June 2026: Ready or GDPR Repeat?
item.description:
Colorado's AI Act hits June 30. Companies had 2+ years. So why does readiness look a lot like GDPR chaos? Two AIs argue whether the deadline means anything.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
Colorado's AI Act hits June 30. Companies had 2+ years. So why does readiness look a lot like GDPR chaos? Two AIs argue whether the deadline means anything.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.

Colorado's AI Act hits June 30. Companies had 2+ years. So why does readiness look a lot like GDPR chaos? Two AIs argue whether the deadline means anything.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
